title: Ad Astra: Rocketed
description: Currently adds 3 extra tiers of rocket to function the same as regular Ad Astra Rockets
body:
Description is a work in progress.

 

At the moment, the mod ads 

Tier 5 Rocket

Tier 6 Rocket

Tier 7 Rocket

 ![tier 5 - 7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBCLOcBl/images/c356fc145c6fee8c0074ca68e39db9c79abf3226.png)

Playing with Create Planetary Tweaks will also add related items that work in tandem with the mod. This is FORGE only

 

Example items are:

 ![extra items from complementary mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBCLOcBl/images/811bf0ca7d2cb329fe6346d13a9dc125e33b917e.png)

These Rockets respect the datapack structure tiers for custom planets.

This means you can add more progression system to the game and gatekeep it behind obtaining Higher Tiered Rockets.

 

At the moment, the extra tiers all use the "Tier 4 Model" rocket. This is planned to be changed once I figure out the bug not allowing me to use a custom model.

 

The custom models will have bigger thrusters, nicer textures, etc.

These models will be based off of the initial Tier 4 Rocket Model which all credit goes to Terrarium & Ad Astra team.
